title: Checkout Mandate
description: Agreement from a User or an Agent to authorize a particular Checkout action.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type claim as defined in SD-JWT. MUST be 'mandate.checkout'.

checkout_jwt.description: base64url-encoded serialized merchant-signed JWT of the Checkout payload.

checkout_hash.description: base64url-encoded hash of the checkout_jwt field value, uniquely identifying this checkout. If this checkout mandate is presented as an sd-jwt and the _sd_alg field is present then the hash algorithm used MUST match the _sd_alg field. Otherwise, sha-256 MUST be used.

iat.description: The creation timestamp as a Unix epoch.

exp.description: The expiration timestamp as a Unix epoch.
